
# Interrupted Time Series Analysis (ITSA): Worked Example {#itsa-applied}

This chapter sketches an applied workflow for ITSA in R.


```{r fig-itsa-workflow, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='ITSA workflow for evaluation (conceptual).', out.width='90%'}
knitr::include_graphics('images/10_itsa_workflow.png')
```


Figure \@ref(fig:fig-itsa-workflow) summarizes a practical workflow: prepare data, visualize, specify and diagnose a model, refine, and report the effect.
